title: Visible Multishot
description: This is a small resource pack that makes crossbows with the Multishot enchantment appear to have three projectiles!
body:
This small resource pack makes crossbows with the Multishot enchantment look like they’re loaded with **three projectiles**!

### IMPORTANT!!!

**This recource pack requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)!!**

> ### [Check out my other packs!](<https://modrinth.com/user/EpicA1M>)

> [**Visual Enchantments**](<https://modrinth.com/collection/AA68Bowh>)
